notificaciones.texto: 📢🔝💯 Victor Wembanyama (1 block today) has passed Chet Holmgren, George Johnson, Giannis Antetokounmpo, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Stephen Curry and is now ranked 65th all-time with 11 in NBA Finals.
📢🔝💯 📢HOF🏛️ Mikal Bridges (1 three-pointer today) has passed Dwyane Wade, Gary Neal, Iman Shumpert, Marcus Smart, Mario Elie and Sam Cassell and is now ranked 65th all-time with 14 in NBA Finals.
